title: space_set_destroy: no body-shape test
description: Test 51 has no body_json matcher — it only verifies the response deserialization. The destroy array is never asserted on the wire. A regression that serialized ids as objects instead of strings, or sent them under the wrong key name, would not be caught. The test should add a body_json matcher verifying { using, methodCalls: [[Space/set, { accountId, destroy: [id] }, r1]] }.
